audit_items.proof_trace: The vault relayer allowance is unconditionally revoked via forceApprove(i_gpV2VaultRelayer, 0) at L103, satisfying the allowance==0 invariant on all paths. The remaining asset balance is only transferred to the fee aggregator when hasFeeAggregator==true (BaseAuction._onAuctionEnd L387-392); when false (contract is self-referential fee aggregator), assets intentionally remain in the contract for inclusion in the next auction cycle, which is by design and enforced consistently by _onAuctionStart re-approving the full balance.
